extracted_rules.class_0: R1: The series has a long low plateau in the middle and a single, sharp high peak near the right end, with values returning to a medium level after the peak.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: The series has one long, wide high plateau in the middle, with medium-level values before and after it and no additional peaks or low plateaus.
extracted_rules.class_2: R1: The series has a long low plateau in the middle and two deep, narrow dips near the right end, with medium-level values between and after the dips.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: The series has a long low plateau in the middle and a single tall spike on the right side (only one pronounced peak after the low segment).
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: The series has a single wide high plateau in the middle, with relatively flat lower values both before and after this plateau, and no additional spikes.
extracted_rules.class_2: R1: The series has a long low plateau in the middle and two separate sharp spikes on the right side (two pronounced peaks after the low segment).

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: Exactly one long low plateau (clearly below the initial level) appears between two high plateaus, and during the right high plateau there is a single short, sharp positive spike above the surrounding level.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: Exactly one long high plateau (clearly above the initial level) appears between two lower plateaus, with no additional sharp spikes or dips inside the high region.
extracted_rules.class_2: R1: Two separated long low plateaus (clearly below the initial level) appear between three higher plateaus, where the series temporarily returns to a high level between the two low regions.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: The series stays around 0.5, briefly drops to a lower plateau (~0.2–0.3) in the middle, then returns to ~0.5 and shows one clear peak above 0.7 near the end.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: The series starts near 0.5, then has a single long high plateau (~0.8) in the middle before dropping back to around 0.5 without any large spikes or extra dips.
extracted_rules.class_2: R1: The series starts near 0.5, drops to a low plateau (~0.15–0.25) in the middle, returns to ~0.5, and within that return region contains an additional sharp deep dip back near the low level before ending again around 0.5.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: The series has a long, wide dip to a low level in the middle, and later a single, brief spike to a higher-than-baseline value before returning to baseline.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: The series stays near a baseline level, then rises sharply to a high plateau that is held for a long central interval, and finally drops sharply back to the original baseline.
extracted_rules.class_2: R1: The series has a long, wide dip to a low level in the middle and, near the end, shows a very sharp, deep but narrow dip before returning to the original baseline.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: The series has a single low plateau (around 0.2–0.25) in the middle, but after returning to its usual mid level (around 0.45–0.5) it contains one clear, narrow peak that rises distinctly higher than all other points.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: The series contains one long, high plateau (around 0.8) in the middle, with values clearly higher than the initial and final segments (around 0.47–0.5), and no distinct peaks or dips interrupting this plateau.
extracted_rules.class_2: R1: The series contains one long, low plateau (around 0.16–0.2) in the middle, and in the later part of the series there is a very deep, narrow dip that drops below this low plateau before returning to the usual level (around 0.47–0.5).

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: One broad low plateau (≈0.2–0.25) in the middle of the series, followed by a short, sharp peak well above baseline (≈0.75–0.8) near the end.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: One long, high plateau (≈0.8–0.82) in the middle of the series, with values before and after this plateau staying around ≈0.48–0.5.
extracted_rules.class_2: R1: One broad low plateau (≈0.16–0.2) in the middle of the series, plus an additional deep, narrow dip (≈0.16–0.2) near the end, both surrounded by higher baseline values (≈0.47–0.5).

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: A long central low plateau (around the middle third of the time axis) between two higher plateaus, followed by a brief sharp peak near the right side.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: A long central high plateau (around the middle third of the time axis) between two lower plateaus, without any sharp peaks or deep dips.
extracted_rules.class_2: R1: A long central low plateau (around the middle third of the time axis) between higher plateaus, with an additional deep, narrow dip (valley) near the right side.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: The series has a long low plateau in the middle and, near the end, a single short spike that rises clearly above the surrounding high baseline.
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: The series has a broad high plateau in the middle, significantly higher than both the starting and ending baseline levels, which remain roughly equal and flat.
extracted_rules.class_2: R1: The series starts and ends at a similar high baseline, but in the middle it contains a wide deep valley followed later by a very narrow, even deeper dip before returning to the high baseline.

extracted_rules.class_0: R1: The series spends a long middle segment at a clearly *lower* level than both its early and late segments (a flat “valley” in the center with higher plateaus before and after).
extracted_rules.class_1: R1: The series spends a long middle segment at a clearly *higher* level than both its early and late segments (a flat “plateau” in the center with lower levels before and after).
extracted_rules.class_2: R1: The series has two distinct deep drops separated by a brief return to a higher level (two “valleys” with a short high segment between them).
